description: Patronus evaluation of v0 BASELINE slide (before RL optimization)
image_description: Dark navy blue background. Title 'Hydrogen Production Methods Comparison' in large bold teal-green font. Table with teal-green headers and white text. Source note at bottom left, 'McKinsey & Company' at bottom right. No page number.

1_white_background.explanation: The pass criteria explicitly states the slide should have a white background, but the provided image has a dark navy background.

2_restrained_color_palette.explanation: The color palette is restrained, using navy, teal-green, and white, and does not have 'rainbow effects'.

3_insight_driven_title.explanation: The title 'Hydrogen Production Methods Comparison' is a descriptive topic label, not an insight-driven conclusion or 'so-what' statement.

4_structured_data_table.explanation: The pass criteria requires 'navy header borders'. The table has headers with a solid teal-green background fill, which is a different style.

5_proper_footer.explanation: The footer is missing the required page number.

6_clean_typography.explanation: The slide demonstrates a clean typography hierarchy with a large bold title and smaller body text.

7_thin_divider_line.explanation: There is no thin divider line below the title area as required.

8_professional_polish.explanation: The slide has a professional and clean design quality consistent with consulting outputs.

summary: 5 of 8 criteria FAILED: white background, insight title, table headers, footer page number, divider line. The baseline slide uses a dark navy background with teal accent colors — fundamentally wrong for McKinsey style.
